summary: Iteration 135 - All 14 requested features tested successfully. Tax Centre (8 tabs), Research Centre (4 tabs), Compliance Centre (4 tabs) all load correctly. All 12 redirect routes work. Sidebar navigation shows correct entries in Personal/Adviser modes. Meeting Mode opens with 6 slides, navigation works, exit returns to normal view.

issues: Compliance Modal appears on page load blocking interactions - user must dismiss it before interacting. This is known from iteration 134.
Recharts console warnings about width/height -1 on initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after layout settles

context_for_next_testing_agent: All consolidation features working. Tax Centre at /tax-analysis-sync has 8 tabs. Research Centre at /stock-research has 4 tabs. Compliance Centre at /adviceos has 4 tabs. All redirect routes work. Meeting Mode at /client-360 opens full-screen overlay with 6 slides. Compliance Modal blocks interactions until dismissed - use force=True for Playwright clicks.

tax_centre_tab_switch.details: Clicked Capital Gains and BAS Calculator tabs successfully

details: Tax Centre (NEW) found in Personal Mode sidebar under Tools
Research Centre (NEW) found in Personal Mode sidebar under Tools

sidebar_adviser_mode.details: Compliance Centre (NEW) found in Adviser Mode sidebar under Compliance section

meeting_mode_opens.details: Meeting button at /client-360 opens full-screen overlay with data-testid='meeting-mode'

meeting_mode_6_slides.details: 6 navigation dots found (meeting-dot-0 through meeting-dot-5). Slides: Client Overview, Goals, Asset Allocation, Family, Action Items, Key Dates

meeting_mode_navigation.details: Previous/Next buttons work correctly with data-testid='meeting-prev' and 'meeting-next'

meeting_mode_exit.details: Exit button (data-testid='exit-meeting-mode') returns to normal client profile view

homepage_no_errors.details: Homepage loads without runtime errors. Console shows expected API fetch errors (gracefully handled) and Recharts width warnings (cosmetic)

mocked_apis_list: DEMO_CLIENT_DATA in Client360View.jsx - hardcoded client profiles for 5 clients (client_1 through client_5)
